title: GitHub Review by greptile-apps[bot]
resolution_summary: Added empty FilterFactory validation to RenderPastePipeline in plugins.go with a corresponding test, and added a continue statement in policy.go's ValidatePolicyRules so that an empty-key rule skips the redundant empty-value check. The policy test was updated to expect one error instead of two for the empty-key-and-empty-value case, reflecting the new early-continue behavior.
